title: Data Explorer Light
content:
# Data Explorer Light

You can display data using the tradition Kelvin Data Explorer Light version embedded into the Kelvin AI chat window.

## Written Example

To start, click on the Kelvin AI menu and type a prompt similar to this;

> make a data explorer light graph of beam pump 1 for the last hour of the pressure and flow rate on the same graph

Kelvin AI will use the Data Explorer Light widget to provide an accurate answer.
summary: You can display data using the tradition Kelvin Data Explorer Light version embedded into the Kelvin AI chat window.
